channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Alan Greenspan and Ayn Rand were close friends, a little-known fact
item.description: One of the most intellectually significant relationships in the life of former Fed chair Alan Greenspan was with his close friend, the novelist Ayn Rand.

item.title: Supreme Court upholds ruling that eliminates key tool for protecting minority voters in 7 states
item.description: The Supreme Court has allowed a ruling that strikes down a crucial mechanism for enforcing Voting Rights Act protections for voters with disabilities or...

item.title: Key facts about the gut microbiome and how to maintain its health
item.description: Wellness influencers often discuss repairing a damaged gut microbiome, while marketers promote tests and supplements for gut health. Here is what...

item.title: Messi sets all-time World Cup scoring record with two goals
item.description: Messi scored his 17th World Cup goal in Argentina's match against Austria, then added another to become the tournament's all-time leading scorer.
